translation.en: Today the weather is too nice.

notes_md:
**Quá trời** means *a lot*, *so much*, or *tons of*. It’s stronger and more emotional than just **nhiều**.

You put it before a noun, verb, or adjective to boost the intensity. It often shows surprise or exaggeration.


It’s casual and expressive. A close synonym for memory: **nhiều ơi là nhiều** (very, very many).
exampleSentencesTranslated: Yesterday, I bought a lot of vegetables at the market to cook.
She has a lot of work to do today so she is very busy.
There are a lot of people walking in the park.
notes:
Quá trời means a lot, so much, or tons of. It’s stronger and more emotional than just nhiều.

You put it before a noun, verb, or adjective to boost the intensity. It often shows surprise or exaggeration.

It’s casual and expressive. A close synonym for memory: nhiều ơi là nhiều (very, very many).

example.en: Today the sky is so beautiful.
example.vi: Hôm nay trời quá trời đẹp.
example.es: Hoy el cielo está tan hermoso.

definitions.es: Una expresión utilizada para enfatizar un gran grado o extensión.
definitions.en: An expression used to emphasize a large degree or extent.
definitions.vi: Một biểu thức được sử dụng để nhấn mạnh một mức độ hoặc phạm vi lớn.

exampleSentences: Hôm qua, anh mua quá trời rau ở chợ để nấu ăn.
Chị có quá trời việc phải làm hôm nay nên rất bận.
Em thấy ngoài công viên có quá trời người đang đi dạo.

translation.en: There are too many people at the party.
